subcodes.first_line: The call of God hath been raised, yet most of the people hear it not. The Most Exalted Pen hath moved, and the people remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ندآء الله و القوم اکثرهم لا یسمعون قد تحرک القلم الاعلی و الناس
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
